basic_details.job_title: RRI Research Assistant (RA) Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Raman Research Institute (RRI) Research Assistant (RA) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website for the recruitment of 2 Research Assistant (RA) posts. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the RRI Research Assistant (RA) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 25 years Age relaxation will be applicable as per Govt. of India rules for the candidates belonging to SC/ST/OBC/PWD categories.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. (Physics / Engineering Physics/ Quantum Technology / Related fields) or B.E. / B.Tech (Engineering Physics / Electronics / Related fields) with a minimum of 60 % marks or equivalent. M. Tech / M. Phil or equivalent degree with a thesis work will be given preference. Candidates appeared for the final examination are also eligible to apply.
qualification.details: M.Sc. (Physics / Engineering Physics/ Quantum Technology / Related fields) or B.E. / B.Tech (Engineering Physics / Electronics / Related fields) with a minimum of 60 % marks or equivalent. M. Tech / M. Phil or equivalent degree with a thesis work will be given preference. Candidates appeared for the final examination are also eligible to apply. If selected, they must submit the provisional degree certificate at the time of joining.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the RRI Research Assistant (RA) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 26-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RRI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the RRI Research Assistant (RA) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Raman Research Institute Research Assistant (RA) positions is 26th May 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Research Assistant (RA) position at the Raman Research Institute through this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have an M.Sc. in Physics, Engineering Physics, Quantum Technology, or related fields, or a B.E./B.Tech in Engineering Physics, Electronics, or related fields with at least 60% marks. M.Tech/M.Phil with thesis work is preferred.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Research Assistant (RA) post is 25 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Research Assistant (RA) post will receive a consolidated monthly salary of Rs. 31,000/-.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for RRI Research Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the RRI Research Assistant (RA) recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Research Assistant posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Assistant (RA) positions at Raman Research Institute will involve a Test and/or Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Can final year students apply for this position?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates who have appeared for their final examination are eligible to apply. However, they must submit their provisional degree certificate at the time of joining.

faq.question: Q9. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The Research Assistant (RA) positions at Raman Research Institute are on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link will be available in the "Important Links" section of this article, along with a link to the official RRI website.
